slides.title: InheritedWidget 🌳
slides.content:
# InheritedWidget

`InheritedWidget` is a base class that allows efficiently propagating information down the widget tree.

* Widgets can access the inherited widget using `context.dependOnInheritedWidgetOfExactType`.
* When the inherited widget changes, dependent widgets rebuild.
* Often used as the foundation for state management solutions (Provider is built on it).

quizData.question: What is the main purpose of InheritedWidget?

options.text: To pass data down the tree efficiently

quizData.explanation: InheritedWidget allows descendants to access data without passing it through constructors.

slides.title: Creating an InheritedWidget
Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content:
## Use `of` method convention

It's common to provide a static `of` method to conveniently access the inherited widget.
